title: Luffy Heads Back to Mock Town
description: Luffy goes back to Bellamy not for pride, but to defend Cricket’s dream and the promise of Sky Island.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Masira, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy, Nami. Luffy goes back to Bellamy not for pride, but to defend Cricket’s dream and the promise of Sky Island.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ahahaha! What a pair of dweebs!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: What's with the fuss at this hour?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Or... or you're a dead man!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Both have Bounties higher than you, Bellamy!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Just like you retards right now!

summary: Luffy goes back to Bellamy not for pride, but to defend Cricket’s dream and the promise of Sky Island.
